featureDetection.rationale: Probes natively for Translation and LanguageDetector availability and manages background loading / model download states.

gracefulFallback.rationale: Uses an intelligent local character-set and keyword fallback classifier so the inbox behaves realistically on unsupported browsers.

genuineInteraction.rationale: Highly interactive email client client-side layout with custom text detection, batch 'detect all' triggering, interactive selected panels, and animated progress metrics.

builderMultipleDemos.rationale: Outstanding concept design implementing a high-quality, full-featured email client mock application.

designSystemContrast.rationale: Adheres strictly to the design system guidelines with great responsive layouts and contrast pairs.
